(LISTED BELOW) SUPPLEMENT TO REPORT NO. 19  CHANG Tung-sun, secretary-general of the Democratic League] wrote a letter to the source from Tientsin in which he stated that the Communists  are not on-1,y unwilling to allow an end to the present civil war short of complete victory., but that they expect and are prepared for an mediate third world war. 2,  CHANG stated that he had Worked his Whole life for peace, but that now the situation is hopeless.* ?a -                tic Q L CLASSIF Class           TO: '  TS    S C0NF      IAV 25X1 I XI AIR            F5I STATE I X NAVY      X  NS
